allow: Bash(awk '/^\\{\\\\color\\{blue\\}/{print NR": OPEN"} /^\\}$/{print NR": CLOSE"}' "c:/EEG/EPEC/EPEC_VS_code/SolarGeoRisk_EPEC_intertemporal/IEEE Paper/use_this_file.tex")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("IEEE Paper\\use_this_file.tex"\); $content = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $lines = $content -split "`n"; for \($i = 1295; $i -lt 1310; $i++\) { $line = $lines[$i]; $hasNonAscii = $false; foreach \($c in $line.ToCharArray\(\)\) { if \([int]$c -gt 127\) { $hasNonAscii = $true; break } }; if \($hasNonAscii\) { Write-Output \("{0}: {1}" -f \($i+1\), $line\); foreach \($c in $line.ToCharArray\(\)\) { if \([int]$c -gt 127\) { Write-Output \("   U+{0:X4}: {1}" -f [int]$c, $c\) } } } })
